---
title: "Stock Exchange Revenue Dashboard"
description: "Jupyter notebook visualizing time-series stock data from Yahoo! Finance with dynamic figures."
date: "2024-05"
categories: [Python, Data Visualization, Jupyter]
---

## Overview

Published a Jupyter notebook that visualizes time-series stock data from Yahoo! Finance using dynamic figures.

## Approach

- Pulled historical stock data via Yahoo! Finance APIs
- Created interactive time-series visualizations
- Analyzed revenue trends and key financial indicators

## Tools & Technologies

- Python
- Jupyter Notebook
- Yahoo! Finance API
- Plotly / dynamic visualization libraries
